discord_integration.description: Discord bot integration with instant, scheduled, and recurring announcements, reusable templates, and dynamic variable replacement
changes: Discord bot API integration with message sending
Alliance tags in message attribution ([TAG] username format)
Error modal dialogs with detailed channel failure information
Bot invite link management in configuration
Rich embed messages as default format
Channel and server name context in audit logs
User info tooltips in audit log viewer (roles, alliances, in-game names)
Rate limiting for Discord message sending
President role for cross-alliance general announcements
Scheduled message system (Phase 2 - v2.0.0)
Schedule announcements for future delivery
Manage scheduled messages with create/delete operations
Automatic message processing via cron job
Visual status tracking (pending, sent, failed)
Timezone-aware scheduling interface
Recurring message system (Phase 3 - v3.0.0)
Daily, weekly, and monthly recurring announcements
Enable/disable toggle for recurring messages
Send history tracking with count and timestamps
Next send time preview and calculation
Unified processor for scheduled and recurring messages
Message templates system (Phase 4 - v4.0.0)
Reusable message templates with variable support
Global and alliance-specific templates
Template submission and approval workflow
Dynamic variable replacement at send-time
Variables: server, user, alliance, datetime, custom fields
Template selector in all message forms
Click-to-insert variable buttons
Template management UI with create/delete/approve
configuration: DISCORD_MAX_INSTANT_PER_HOUR - Maximum instant messages per hour

multi_role_system.description: Multiple simultaneous roles per user with APE as independent role
changes: Users can have multiple roles: admin, r5, r4, ape, none, disabled
APE role can be assigned independently without R4/R5
No alliance requirement for APE-only users
Automatic migration converts role+powereditor to roles array
Full backward compatibility maintained

migration_system.description: Automatic version migration and schema upgrade system

navigation_system.description: Hamburger menu, footer, and floating action buttons for improved navigation

power_trends.description: Interactive power trends chart with iOS-style dual-range slider using rc-slider library
changes: Replaced custom dual-range slider with rc-slider library
iOS-style slider with smooth animations and scale effects
Improved accessibility with keyboard navigation support
Enhanced hover and drag interactions
Dark mode support with theme-aware styling
Fixed z-index and pointer-events issues with previous implementation

public_api.description: Read-only REST API with control/data plane separation

deployment_protection.description: CRITICAL FIX: Prevents deployment from overwriting production .env with rotated JWT keys
changes: Excluded admin/.env from deployment (.ftpignore)
Excluded production state files (secret_keys.json, blacklisted_tokens.json, users.json)
Removed .env generation from GitHub Actions workflow
Created production .env management guide (docs/PRODUCTION-ENV-SETUP.md)
deployment_protection.impact: Eliminates mass user logouts caused by key rotation overwrites during deployment

multi_server_support.description: Infrastructure for supporting multiple Last War servers (1586, 9999, etc.) with minimal code changes
multi_server_support.approach: Simple data-layer changes with server field tagging
changes: Add 'server' field to all JSON records (alliances, votes, notifications, etc.)
Convert user permissions to per-server structure
APIs filter data by ?server= parameter
Admin panel shows all servers with [1586] [ORCE] prefix format
Public sites deploy separately with SERVER_ID environment variable
Single admin panel serves all servers
Automatic migration via version upgrade system

deployment_model.public_sites: Each server deploys own copy with config
deployment_model.data_isolation: Filtered by server parameter at query time
